channel.title: Modern Nostalgia Club — Blog
channel.description: Music stories, artist features, and industry perspective from ModernNostalgia.club.

item.title: Spotify Playlists for Music Submission: Get Heard, Get Clear, Get Paid
item.dc:creator: ModernNostalgia.club
item.description: How Modernnostalgiaclub LLC streams, judges, and curates music for profitability and licensing readiness.

item.title: The "Human-First" Premium: Why 97% of Music Supervisors Demand AI Transparency
item.dc:creator: ModernNostalgia.club
item.description: In early 2026, 97% of music supervisors now require disclosure of AI involvement in music creation. Here is why human created music is now a market asset.

item.title: Responsible Active Listening in 2025
item.dc:creator: ModernNostalgia.club
item.description: Why listeners have to lead, not just press play. Music is everywhere now — but when something is this easy to get, we stop noticing how rare it is.

item.title: What LaRussell Really Teaches Us About Creative Business
item.dc:creator: ModernNostalgia.club
item.description: Beyond the music, LaRussell has built a blueprint for how independent artists can create sustainable creative businesses without compromising their vision.

item.title: Why Alternative and Diaspora DSPs Are the Future, and Why Independent Labels Should Work With Them Directly
item.dc:creator: ModernNostalgia.club
item.description: The streaming landscape is shifting. Alternative and diaspora-focused DSPs are creating new opportunities for independent artists and labels willing to think beyond the mainstream platforms.
